requirement_topic.en: BEE Star Labelling — Room Air Conditioners / Covered AC Categories
requirement_topic.zh: BEE星级标签——房间空调器 / 纳入范围的空调类别
requirement_topic.zht: BEE星級標籤——房間空調器 / 納入範圍的空調類別

summary.en: India's Bureau of Energy Efficiency administers the Standards & Labelling programme under the Energy Conservation Act. Room air conditioners and other covered AC categories use BEE star labels and Indian Seasonal Energy Efficiency Ratio (ISEER) schedules. Heat pumps sold as cooling/heating air conditioners may fall into a covered AC labelling category; dedicated space-heating or water-heating heat pumps require a current product-category check because Indian heat-pump-specific MEPS and labels are still evolving.
summary.zh: 印度能源效率局依据《能源节约法》管理标准与标签计划。房间空调器及其他纳入范围的空调类别使用BEE星级标签和印度季节能效比（ISEER）目录。作为制冷/制热空调销售的热泵可能落入已覆盖的空调标签类别；专用空间供暖或热水热泵需要核查当前产品类别，因为印度热泵专门MEPS和标签仍在演进。
summary.zht: 印度能源效率局依據《能源節約法》管理標準與標籤計畫。房間空調器及其他納入範圍的空調類別使用BEE星級標籤和印度季節能效比（ISEER）目錄。作為制冷/制熱空調銷售的熱泵可能落入已覆蓋的空調標籤類別；專用空間供暖或熱水熱泵需要核查目前產品類別，因為印度熱泵專門MEPS和標籤仍在演進。

standards_or_laws: BEE Room Air Conditioner labelling regulations and schedules
ISEER rating methodology for covered air-conditioner categories

summary.en: China uses its domestic energy-efficiency label and GB 21455 for applicable air conditioners, plus GB/T 25127 series for low-ambient heat pumps. Chinese COP, APF, or domestic label data cannot be directly carried over to BEE ISEER star registration.
summary.zh: 中国对适用空调器使用国内能效标识和GB 21455，并对低环境温度热泵使用GB/T 25127系列。中国COP、APF或国内标签数据不能直接转用于BEE ISEER星级注册。
summary.zht: 中國對適用空調器使用國內能效標識和GB 21455，並對低環境溫度熱泵使用GB/T 25127系列。中國COP、APF或國內標籤資料不能直接轉用於BEE ISEER星級註冊。

gap.en: For covered AC-type heat pumps, BEE registration, Indian label artwork, model data, and ISEER evidence are needed. For non-AC dedicated heat pumps, the gap is a category determination and monitoring of evolving Indian MEPS/labelling policy.
gap.zh: 对于纳入范围的空调型热泵，需要BEE注册、印度标签图样、型号数据和ISEER证据。对于非空调类专用热泵，差距在于产品类别判定以及持续监测印度MEPS/标签政策演进。
gap.zht: 對於納入範圍的空調型熱泵，需要BEE註冊、印度標籤圖樣、型號資料和ISEER證據。對於非空調類專用熱泵，差距在於產品類別判定以及持續監測印度MEPS/標籤政策演進。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation for BEE-labelled product categories notified under the Energy Conservation Act; test standards and schedules are conformity routes for the covered category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese categories covered by domestic energy-efficiency labelling rules

source.publisher: Bureau of Energy Efficiency, Ministry of Power, Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap for covered AC categories — BEE star-label registration and ISEER evidence are required; Chinese energy-label data is not accepted as a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 纳入范围的空调类别存在差距——需要BEE星级标签注册和ISEER证据；中国能效标签数据不能替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 納入範圍的空調類別存在差距——需要BEE星級標籤註冊和ISEER證據；中國能效標籤資料不能替代。
